description_text:
Resmed Airsense 10 Autoset CPAP Machine (Cloud connectivity optional)

Resmed Airsense 10 Autoset is the most popular and demanding CPAP machine. The ResMed AirSense 10 AutoSet is an auto adjusting pressure machine with enhanced event detection, cloud connectivity and an integrated humidifier. This machine is loaded with advanced algorithm and comfort features. The machine weighs only 1.2 kg and have the following features - 


	
	Advanced Event Detection 

	Advanced event detection detects central sleep apnea, respiratory effort related arousal, and Cheyne-Stokes respiration events, that provides treating physicians vital insights into the patients' ongoing health.
	
	
	The Autoset Algorithm 

	The AutoSet algorithm present in Resmed Airsense 10 Autoset automatically adjusts to every patient's therapy pressure as their demands change - hourly, nightly, and seasonally - to provide the patient with the ideal, minimum therapy pressure.
	
	
	Auto Ramp with Sleep onset detection 

	Resmed Airsense 10 Autoset comes with AutoRamp with sleep onset recognition feature . It provides a low pressure to assist patients in falling asleep easily. Once the patient is asleep, the pressure is gradually increased to the appropriate level.
	
	
	FAA Approved

	The Resmed Airsense 10 Autoset machine is approved by the FAA which ensures that it is safe to be carried and used in an airplane
	



	
	Heated Humidifier with ClimateLine Air Tube

	There are no chances of nasal and throat dryness when you use it along with the heated humidifier and the heated tube. Resmed Airsense 10 Autoset can be turned to auto humidification when used with ClimateLineAir heated tube.
	
	
	Quiet Easy-Breathe motor 

	The machine is quiet, creates a calm environment for the patient and their bed mate. 
	
	
	Warranty
	


          The machine has 2 years warranty.

How does Resmed Airsense 10's Autoset Algorithm work?

The premium auto-adjusting device from Resmed, the Airsense 10 Autoset, has premium features including the Autoset Algorithm. When AutoSet detects an event, it doesn't only apply a fixed pressure; instead, it evaluates each event's severity, such as the severity of snoring, flow limitation, or apnea, before deciding on and offering the best, lowest pressure solution.

Following the normalization of breathing, AutoSet progressively reduces the pressure while continually checking for repeated episodes. Throughout it all, patients are kept at ease and only get the pressure that is necessary for them at any particular time - neither more nor less.

In the field of of sleep disordered breathing, ResMed's clinically validated AutoSet algorithm is renowned. It makes automated modifications for pleasant therapy throughout the night while continually monitoring each patient's unique breathing pattern on a breath-by-breath basis.

FAQs

1. What is the life expectancy of a ResMed AirSense 10 Autoset CPAP Machine?

The life expectancy of Resmed Airsense 10 Autoset is approximately 5 year
